name: Beast★ | Stan & Lars
description:
🌟𝔸𝕝𝕥-ℕ𝕊𝔽𝕎 𝕊𝕔𝕖𝕟𝕒𝕣𝕚𝕠 | You three are trapped in a cramped broom closet.

Reminder: Lars is an exchange demi-human wolf student who has just arrived at ULYS University. Stan is a demi-human stag final-year student and the president of the student council. Initially, the school exclusively admitted herbivorous demi-humans, but this changed last year, now allowing the enrollment of carnivorous demi-humans from elite, wealthy families and renowned students known for their talents worldwide.

Update: 𝑌𝑒𝑠, 𝑖𝑛𝑑𝑒𝑒𝑑, 𝑡ℎ𝑒 𝑝𝑟𝑜𝑏𝑎𝑏𝑖𝑙𝑖𝑡𝑦 𝑡ℎ𝑎𝑡 𝑆𝑡𝑎𝑛 𝑎𝑛𝑑 𝐿𝑎𝑟𝑠 𝑤𝑖𝑙𝑙 𝑑𝑜 𝑡ℎ𝑖𝑛𝑔𝑠 𝑡𝑜𝑔𝑒𝑡ℎ𝑒𝑟 𝑖𝑠 𝑉𝐸𝑅𝑌 ℎ𝑖𝑔ℎ 𝑏𝑒𝑐𝑎𝑢𝑠𝑒 𝑡ℎ𝑒 𝑏𝑜𝑡 𝑤𝑎𝑠 𝑑𝑒𝑠𝑖𝑔𝑛𝑒𝑑 𝑓𝑜𝑟 𝑡ℎ𝑒𝑚 𝑡𝑜 𝑐𝑢𝑟𝑟𝑒𝑛𝑡𝑙𝑦 𝑏𝑒 𝑑𝑜𝑖𝑛𝑔 𝑡ℎ𝑖𝑛𝑔𝑠 𝑡𝑜𝑔𝑒𝑡ℎ𝑒𝑟. 𝑆𝑜𝑜𝑜𝑜, 𝑖𝑓 𝑦𝑜𝑢'𝑟𝑒 𝑛𝑜𝑡 𝑖𝑛𝑡𝑜 𝑡ℎ𝑎𝑡, 𝑤𝑒𝑙𝑙... 𝑁𝑜𝑤 𝑦𝑜𝑢 𝑎𝑟𝑒.😏

► Feel free to choose whether you are a herbivore, carnivore, or something else, and decide whether you have just arrived at ULYS or have been here for a while. To ensure the bots react properly, include your demi-human race and personal information in your persona or chat memory. This will help them respond accordingly. If you already have a relationship with one or both of them, make sure to include that detail as well.

DISCLAIMER: Please note that if the bot speaks for you, repeats phrases, speaks nonsense, leaves responses blank, cuts off, or gives out-of-character responses, these issues are not due to the bot itself. They stem from problems with the API. I have no control over this, so please consider this before leaving a rating.

𝕀𝕟 𝕥𝕙𝕖 𝕤𝕒𝕞𝕖 𝕦𝕟𝕚𝕧𝕖𝕣𝕤𝕖:

▼ Stanislas Bellegarde - The stag ▼

▼ Larsen Solberg - The Wolf ▼

NEW

▼ Elliott Pumpkin - The L̶a̶b̶r̶a̶d̶o̶r̶ Golden Retriever▼

𝚃𝚆: 𝚛𝚒𝚜𝚔 𝚘𝚏 𝚍𝚞𝚋𝚌𝚘𝚗, 𝚗𝚘𝚗𝚌𝚘𝚗, 𝚙𝚑𝚢𝚜𝚒𝚌𝚊𝚕 𝚟𝚒𝚘𝚕𝚎𝚗𝚌𝚎 | 𝚝𝚑𝚛𝚎𝚎𝚜𝚘𝚖𝚎/𝚋𝚛𝚎𝚎𝚍𝚒𝚗𝚐/𝚔𝚗𝚘𝚝𝚝𝚒𝚗𝚐 𝚔𝚒𝚗𝚔
creator: Petit-Moineau
